name: Tactics & Strategy Master 3:Gemini Strategy
short_description: The Gemini Strategy is the third work of the Master of Strategies and Tactics series. This work still adopts the way of chess.
detailed_description:
SERIES



About the Game

The Gemini Strategy is the third work of Tactics & Strategy Master series. This work still adopts the way of strategy.

Return to traditional strategy game

Move, attack, skill, prop, standby. The traditional war chess operation menu brings you back to the traditional strategy game world and recalls the past good times~

Free transfer

Each role can be transferred once, and there are two directions. The protagonist has a third career change direction. Create your strongest team through different professional cooperation!

Numerous roles

The number of operable roles in this work has reached 12, and each role has its own characteristics.

Challenging special conditions

The game has special conditions from the beginning of the first stage. For you, a veteran strategy player, how to achieve more special conditions will be a problem for you.

A richer plot

The game will be launched in a fantasy world. A total of 12 men and women with different personalities make the plot more abundant. There is a hidden undercurrent among the church, Kingdom and imperial palace. How to restore the order of the Kingdom and break the enemy's conspiracy depends on your efforts!

Hidden elements

There are various hidden elements in this game, including hidden treasure chest, hidden plot and hidden chapter. Only the special conditions can be opened, so please enjoy the fun of exploration.

New talent system

Each stage will get one talent points, but you can't light up all the talents, so you need to think about how to build your team.


We hope to make a better game, which needs your support. We look forward to receiving your feedback.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English, Traditional Chinese*, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
